description: CompositionCharcoal streaked jeans made of a cotton and spandex blend fabric, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket inside the right one and metallic buttons on the pocket ends, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand badge on the right pocket at the back, loops on the waist and has a metal zipper and button closureFitRegular fit Mid rise Straight legWash careTurn inside out before washing and dryingMachine wash cold separately using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or dry flat in shadeWarm ironIf you're a denim person, then these charcoal streaked jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. With a mid waist, great regular fit and stretchable fabric, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with casual shirts and sports shoes or funky t-shirts and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 44"Height: 6', Waist: 32", Hips: 40"
